TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lacihakan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 197 buwan, 497 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 235 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 51%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lacihakan hya' ga Olaw. tay mkyahu' na Lacihakan hya' ga Olalip. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Lacihakan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lacihakan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa olaw. taj mkjaħuʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa olalip. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lacihakan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 197 buwan, 497 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 235 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 51%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lacihakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lacihakan hya' ga Olaw. tay mkyahu' na Lacihakan hya' ga Olalip. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Lacihakan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lacihakan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa olaw. taj mkjaħuʔ na laʦ~ʨiħakan ħjaʔ ɣa olalip. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ laʦ~ʨiħakan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
